messages.content: Output only space-separated integers, nothing else.

You are a time-series forecaster. Below is a univariate sequence of 30 integers in [0, 99]. Continue the sequence with exactly 24 more integers, separated by single spaces, no other text.

Sequence: 89 87 90 95 95 99 92 93 86 81 69 70 67 68 59 58 55 48 41 16 9 8 7 4 4 0 4 3 3 4
